tasks.name: Create DashboardPageObject class
tasks.purpose: Encapsulate dashboard page interactions following established Page Object pattern

constraints: Follow existing PO pattern from auth.po.ts
Use data-testid selectors for all widgets
Include methods for navigation, widget visibility checks, and widget interactions

tasks.input_state: Reference PO exists at apps/e2e/tests/authentication/auth.po.ts with established patterns
tasks.output_state: DashboardPageObject class exists at apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.po.ts with methods for all 7 widgets
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PO class exports methods: goto(), getWidgetLocator(name), isWidgetVisible(name), getPresentationsTableRows()
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -q 'export class DashboardPageObject' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.po.ts

tasks.name: Create dashboard navigation test
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard page loads and URL is correct for authenticated user

constraints: Use pre-authenticated AUTH_STATES.TEST_USER
Use setupSession pattern from auth tests
Wait for hydration before assertions
Verify URL ends with /home

tasks.output_state: Test file exists with navigation test verifying /home URL and page load
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: navigates to /home, waits for hydration, verifies URL matches /home

tasks.name: Create widget visibility tests
tasks.purpose: Verify all dashboard widgets render when user has data

constraints: Use toPass() for data-dependent visibility checks
Check all 7 widgets: course-progress, spider-chart, kanban-summary, activity-feed, quick-actions, coaching-sessions, presentations-table
Use data-testid selectors for each widget

tasks.input_state: DashboardPageObject has isWidgetVisible() method, test file exists
tasks.output_state: Test verifies all 7 widgets are visible using toPass() pattern
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: all 7 widget data-testid elements are visible within CI_TIMEOUTS.element
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web-e2e test -- --grep 'renders all dashboard widgets'

tasks.name: Create widget content tests
tasks.purpose: Verify widgets display expected data for test user

constraints: Verify course progress shows percentage
Verify spider chart has data points
Verify presentations table has at least 1 row
Verify activity feed has at least 1 item
Use toPass() for all data-dependent checks

tasks.input_state: DashboardPageObject has widget locator methods, test user has dashboard data
tasks.output_state: Tests verify widget content: progress percentage, spider chart data, table rows, activity items
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Tests pass: course progress shows number, spider chart visible, presentations table has rows, activity feed has items

tasks.name: Create empty state tests

action.target: empty state tests for new user scenario

tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard shows appropriate empty states when user has no data

constraints: Use separate test with AUTH_STATES.NEW_USER or create new user
Verify empty state messages for widgets without data
Check for CTA buttons in empty states
Use toPass() pattern for visibility checks

tasks.input_state: DashboardPageObject exists, new user test state available
tasks.output_state: Tests verify empty states render with appropriate messages and CTAs for new users
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: empty states visible for course, spider chart, presentations table when new user has no data

tasks.name: Create presentations table interaction test

action.target: test for presentations table edit link navigation

tasks.purpose: Verify clicking edit link in presentations table navigates to canvas editor

constraints: Find first presentation row with edit link
Click edit link
Verify navigation to /home/ai/blocks/ or canvas route
Use waitForURL to verify navigation

tasks.input_state: DashboardPageObject has presentations table methods, test user has at least 1 presentation
tasks.output_state: Test verifies clicking edit link navigates to presentation editor
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: clicks edit link in presentations table, URL changes to canvas editor route
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web-e2e test -- --grep 'navigates to presentation editor'

tasks.name: Create performance validation test
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard meets LCP performance targets using Playwright metrics

constraints: Measure LCP using Performance Observer API
Target: LCP < 1500ms on desktop, < 2500ms on mobile
Use page.evaluate to access Performance API
Log LCP value for debugging

tasks.output_state: Test measures and validates LCP against performance targets
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: LCP measured via Performance API, value < 1500ms, test logs LCP value

tasks.name: Create accessibility integration test
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard meets WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards

constraints: Use HybridAccessibilityTester.runFullAudit()
Target WCAG level AA
Check pass status from audit results
Log violations if audit fails

tasks.output_state: Test runs accessibility audit on dashboard, verifies WCAG AA compliance
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test passes: HybridAccessibilityTester.runFullAudit() returns pass: true for dashboard
